entries.title: xAI fired an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety, new lawsuit claims
entries.description: A former xAI engineer is suing the company and SpaceX, alleging he was fired for raising AI safety concerns about Grok days before SpaceX's historic IPO.

entries.title: Fresh off bond sale, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending continues
entries.description: Companies are burning through exorbitant sums of money to keep pace in the AI arms race. Debt is climbing.

entries.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
entries.description: Wits its official share pricing announcement, SpaceX's IPO has begun.

entries.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
entries.description: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the  risk of outright fraud.

entries.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
entries.description: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.

entries.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
entries.description: The new chatbot, called Ask DoorDash, allows users to search the app for what they're looking for in their own words instead of having to scroll through restaurants and stores to build a cart.

entries.title: Opendoor’s India exit is fueling a bigger conversation about AI and outsourcing
entries.description: The decision comes as India emerges as the world’s largest GCC market.

entries.title: Anthropic’s Dario Amodei has just one direct report
entries.description: If founders and other business leaders weren't already envious of Dario Amodei, who sits atop one of the world's fastest-growing AI companies, they're going to be seriously envious now.

entries.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
entries.description: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

entries.description: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

entries.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
entries.description: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

entries.title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
entries.description: The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.

entries.description: Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation.

entries.title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
entries.description: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.
